strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, directly aligning with required AI skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and craftsmanship
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest — core required stack technologies
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles despite being a secondary requirement
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially hindering collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise environment
response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional full-stack depth, AI-agent experience, and strong engineering craftsmanship with clear alignment to core responsibilities, but lacks direct exposure to two mandatory stack components (Nest.js, Vitest) and has minimal recent Java/Kotlin use. His open-source leadership and cross-platform adaptability are strong positives, though language and stack gaps introduce risk.
